pass_condition: Exactly one provider, one symbol, one endpoint, one network call, and no raw payload retention.
Probe summary contains actual EPS, consensus or estimated EPS, surprise magnitude, surprise percent or computable equivalent, fiscal period, and report date.
Provider documentation or response metadata supports point-in-time use, as-of query semantics, or an auditable pre-release estimate snapshot.
Provider record can be joined to SEC EDGAR Item 2.02 event by symbol/CIK plus fiscal period/report date without using returns.
The provider probe produces only entitlement/schema evidence; no extractor, PEAD backtest, parameter sweep, paper trade, live trade, or promotion is executed.
